ContactFlowModuleAliasARN.description: The identifier of the contact flow module alias (ARN). This is constructed from the ContactFlowModuleArn and AliasId.
ContactFlowModuleAliasARN.markdownDescription:
The identifier of the contact flow module alias (ARN). This is constructed from the ContactFlowModuleArn and AliasId.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 500  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[-a-z0-9]*:connect:[-a-z0-9]+:[0-9]{12}:instance/[-a-zA-Z0-9]+/flow-module/[-a-zA-Z0-9]+:[-a-zA-Z0-9]+$  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

AliasId.description: The unique identifier of the alias.
AliasId.markdownDescription:
The unique identifier of the alias.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 500  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

ContactFlowModuleId.description: The identifier of the contact flow module (ARN) this alias is tied to.
ContactFlowModuleId.markdownDescription:
The identifier of the contact flow module (ARN) this alias is tied to.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 500  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[-a-z0-9]*:connect:[-a-z0-9]+:[0-9]{12}:instance/[-a-zA-Z0-9]+/flow-module/[-a-zA-Z0-9]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

ContactFlowModuleVersion.description: The version number of the contact flow module this alias points to.
ContactFlowModuleVersion.markdownDescription:
The version number of the contact flow module this alias points to.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: Integer  
Update requires: No interruption

Name.markdownDescription:
The name of the alias.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 127  
Pattern: ^([$0-9a-zA-Z][_-]?)+$  
Update requires: No interruption

Description.markdownDescription:
The description of the alias.

Required: No
